data.body:
### Summary

* Moved the executable scripts from `claude-todo/bin/` into a new canonical tooling location at `.skogai/tools/` (`healthcheck`, context scripts, `find-agent-root.sh`, `fetch-docs.sh`, and `claude-md-linecheck`).
* Added `.skogai/tools/CLAUDE.md` documenting executable inventory with **purpose, usage, and arguments**, plus discoverability notes for larger environment tools (`gptodo`, `wt`, `gita`, `skogai`, `skogcli`, `argc`).
* Converted `claude-todo/bin/*` script files into compatibility wrappers that `exec` the corresponding `.skogai/tools/*` binary, so existing hooks/config paths keep working while executables are now centralized.
* Updated `claude-todo/bin/CLAUDE.md` to clarify this folder is now a compatibility wrapper router.
* Updated root `CLAUDE.md` structure/routes to point to the new canonical tooling router at `@.skogai/tools/CLAUDE.md` and legacy wrappers at `@claude-todo/bin/CLAUDE.md`.
* Committed all changes with: `feat: move home executables to .skogai/tools and document tooling`.
* Created a PR record via the `make_pr` tool with title/body summarizing the migration and validation.

**Testing**

* ✅ `git diff --check`
* ✅ `./.skogai/tools/healthcheck`
* ✅ `./claude-todo/bin/healthcheck`
* ✅ `./claude-todo/bin/find-agent-root.sh`

[View task →](<https://chatgpt.com/s/cd_69e4a58cea4c81919100331050b6e06d>)

issue.title: feat: document all binaries/scripts into CLAUDE.md
